alpha.question_full: What minimal functor on the terminal coalgebra would turn the absorption of its own observer-independent contradictions into new generative structure while preserving bisimilarity?

beta.question_full: What minimal non-commutativity in the iteration of a lone degree-zero endomorphism first generates detectable temporality from pure self-contact?
